title: Lam Research Corporation Announces $5 Billion Share Repurchase Authorization and Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: FREMONT, Calif., May 11, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Lam Research Corporation (Nasdaq: LRCX) today announced that its Board of Directors approved a $5 billion share repurchase authorization and a quarterly dividend of $1.50 per share of common stock.

title: No Lie: These Stocks Pay You to Own Them
text: Whether the market is bullish or bearish, these stocks will pay you to hold steady.

title: Why ESG Investing Doesn't Actually Work
text: The practice of investing based on environmental, social and governance (ESG) criteria has become increasingly popular over the years. Last year was a banner year for cash inflows to ESG funds, with these funds reaching a record of approximately $330 billion in collective assets under management according to data from Morningstar.
